card.title: Oxytocin Nasal Spray
card.description: Often referred to as the ‘love drug,’ oxytocin is a hormone released by the pituitary gland that functions as a chemical messenger in the brain. It is associated with social interactions, emotional bonding, and connection, and has a role in stress response and cortisol regulation.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Easy to Use
benefits.description: A simple nasal spray for effortless support—no injections or pills required.

benefits.title: Fast-Acting & Effective
benefits.description: Absorbs quickly through the nasal spray for rapid effects on mood, bonding, and intimacy.

benefits.title: Enhances Connection
benefits.description: Supports emotional bonding, stress reduction, and sexual health.

splitContent.title: Better than Netflix and chill
splitContent.subTitle: Oxytocin boosts trust and connection in relationships, making you feel closer to those around you. Plus, it can improve your sleep by helping you relax.

quotes.quote: “Before Blokes, I was taking what I thought I needed. After my blood test and meeting with their team, I now know what my body needs. I believe the body needs a proper internal balance in order to perform optimally. Blokes delivered just that!”
quotes.author: Michael Eckert
